_comment: Wakil config — copy to ~/.config/wakil/config.json and edit. Precedence: defaults < config file < env < flags. Every field below is OPTIONAL unless marked '(required)'; unset fields use the built-in defaults shown in internal/config/config.go DefaultConfig().
_comment_docker: Docker sandbox hardening. --cap-drop=ALL + --read-only + --security-opt=no-new-privileges are always applied. docker_caps re-adds specific caps if the toolchain needs them (e.g. ["CHOWN"] if go build fails). docker_memory and docker_pids_limit set resource ceilings.
_comment_subagents: Subagent dispatch: dispatch_subagent spawns a read-only discovery worker. dispatch_subagents fans out several in parallel. max_parallel_subagents bounds concurrency. subagent_endpoint / subagent_backend route children to a different endpoint or backend than the parent.
_comment_costs: Per-source pricing for the cost-tracking sidebar. Unpriced sources show '—', not '$0.00'. inference is a single rate over local proxy tokens (compute estimate). inference_backends holds real per-token rates for external providers routed through the proxy. mashura is keyed by oracle model ID.
_comment_mashura: Counsel: second opinions from external models. oracle_enabled gates the tools. mashura_panels defines named model groups; mashura_tool_panels maps each tool to a panel. Keys are read at call time from env vars, never stored here.
_comment_lsp: Language-server-backed code intelligence. Off by default. lsp_servers maps a language to a server; the sandbox Dockerfile ships gopls for Go.
_comment_browser: Headless-browser tools (chromedp + Chromium) for visual verification, DOM inspection, interaction testing. Off by default. Requires chromium in the sandbox image (included in the default Dockerfile).
_comment_mcp: MCP tool servers. Each entry is a named server with stdio or http transport. Tools appear automatically when configured.
_comment_search: Native web search. SearXNG (self-hosted) or Google Custom Search. Both built-in — no external binaries.
_comment_context: Context window management. Absolute byte limits (fallback) and relative fractions (override when n_ctx is known). tool_result_cap limits per-result bytes kept in context; turn_tool_budget is the per-turn cumulative budget.
_comment_subagent_budget: Subagent tool-loop budgets. 0 = use built-in defaults. subagent_max_tool_iterations caps tool round-trips per dispatch (default 30). subagent_turn_tool_budget caps cumulative tool output per dispatch (default 120000, auto-clamped to 35% of active hardMax). subagent_tool_result_cap limits per-result chars (default 12000).
_comment_backend: Proxy backend routing (ilm-proxy only). backend is the default X-Ilm-Backend. external_backends lists names known to route to external/cloud providers (used by the egress consent gate). aux_model pins the proxy's auxiliary model.
_comment_trace: Rich JSONL trace capture for every TUI session. trace_dir defaults to ~/.local/share/wakil/traces.
_comment_misc: agent_prompt_path defaults to agent.txt next to the config file. backend_max_retries caps automatic retries for transient backend failures in unattended runs. mention_base is the base directory for @ file mentions.
